pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 11; keeping 1.8 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or build toolchain expectations for a J11 project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 1.3.3.RELEASE to 2.2.6.RELEASE.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.x is incompatible with JDK 11 and many modern dependencies; upgrading is required to compile and run on the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace MySQL connector with PostgreSQL driver.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application logic likely changed to use PostgreSQL; the old driver would cause runtime failures if the DB config points to PG.
